root.sql:
select '!loan_payment_date_2!' as monthly_date ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name
,count( distinct sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) as count_paid ,sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount * sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status ) as amount_paid
,( SELECT count( distinct sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.membership_no ) FROM sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard , sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_cls_mon_mem_shr WHERE sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.membership_no = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.membership_no and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.monthly_date = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.monthly_date and sc_lon_m_rule.paid_wait_status = '0' and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.principal_balance > 0 and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.loan_code in ( '0' , '1' , 'F' , 'G' , 'D' , 'H', 'I' , 'J' , 'K' , 'L' , 'M' , 'N' ) and sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard .monthly_date = PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_RelativeMonth( '!loan_payment_date_2!' , -1 ) ) as count_bf
,( SELECT sum(principal_balance ) FROM sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard , sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_cls_mon_mem_shr WHERE sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.membership_no = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.membership_no and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.monthly_date = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.monthly_date and sc_lon_m_rule.paid_wait_status = '0' and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.principal_balance > 0 and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.loan_code in ( '0' , '1' , 'F' , 'G' , 'D' , 'H', 'I' , 'J' , 'K' , 'L' , 'M' , 'N' ) and sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard .monthly_date = PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_RelativeMonth( '!loan_payment_date_2!' , -1 ) ) as bal_bf
,( SELECT sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount * sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status) FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail , sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no= sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.paid_wait_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code in ( '0' , '1' , 'F' , 'G' , 'D' , 'H', 'I' , 'J' , 'K' , 'L' , 'M' , 'N' ) and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '!loan_payment_date_1!' and '!loan_payment_date_2!' and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code in ( 'RM' ) ) as amount_return
,( SELECT - sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount * sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status) FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail , sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no= sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.paid_wait_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code in ( '0' , '1' , 'F' , 'G' , 'D' , 'H', 'I' , 'J' , 'K' , 'L' , 'M' , 'N' ) and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '!loan_payment_date_1!' and '!loan_payment_date_2!' and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code in ( 'PL','RC','PM','RO' ) ) as amount_receive
,( SELECT count( distinct sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.membership_no ) FROM sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard , sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_cls_mon_mem_shr WHERE sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.membership_no = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.membership_no and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.monthly_date = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.monthly_date and sc_lon_m_rule.paid_wait_status = '0' and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.principal_balance > 0 and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.loan_code in ( '0' , '1' , 'F' , 'G' , 'D' , 'H', 'I' , 'J' , 'K' , 'L' , 'M' , 'N' ) and sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard .monthly_date = '!loan_payment_date_2!' ) as count_fw
,( SELECT sum(principal_balance ) FROM sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard , sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_cls_mon_mem_shr WHERE sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.membership_no = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.membership_no and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.monthly_date = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.monthly_date and sc_lon_m_rule.paid_wait_status = '0' and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.principal_balance > 0 and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard.loan_code in ( '0' , '1' , 'F' , 'G' , 'D' , 'H', 'I' , 'J' , 'K' , 'L' , 'M' , 'N' ) and sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_mon_mem_loncard .monthly_date = '!loan_payment_date_2!' ) as bal_fw
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item where sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_lon_m_rule.account_id and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code in ( '01','AD','AT','RR','RD' ) and sc_lon_m_rule.paid_wait_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no <> 'fundmem' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type <> 'ภ' and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.entry_id <> 'orn2' --รหัสรายการปรับปรุง 3ส 3พ ช่วง สิงหา กันยา ตุลา 62 and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '1/8/2019' and '31/8/2019'
group by sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name order by sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id
